queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  p.category,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC
queries.inputQueryString:

JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  p.department,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.category) AS categories
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY p.department
ORDER BY revenue DESC

FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY p.department
ORDER BY revenue DESC

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  u.traffic_source,
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS customers,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders
FROM order_items oi
JOIN users u ON oi.user_id = u.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY u.traffic_source
ORDER BY revenue DESC

WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY u.traffic_source
ORDER BY revenue DESC

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  p.category,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.brand) AS brands,
  ROUND(AVG(oi.sale_price), 2) AS avg_price,
  ROUND(AVG(p.retail_price - p.cost), 2) AS avg_margin
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 6
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  p.category,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS orders,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.brand) AS brands,
  ROUND(AVG(oi.sale_price), 2) AS avg_price,
  ROUND(AVG(p.retail_price - p.cost), 2) AS avg_margin
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE oi.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 6
